overall.description: A spaceship navigates through a dense asteroid field in deep space, viewed from a third-person chase camera perspective. The footage displays high-fidelity game engine graphics with a dark blue nebula backdrop, scattered rocky debris, and the ship's illuminated blue thrusters cutting through the void.

diffuse blue-green nebula filling the background with subtle glowing clouds
loose field of small to medium rocks floating in space

segments.scene_description: The spaceship maintains a steady course through deep space, approaching a dense cluster of asteroids that gradually moves from the distant center to the foreground. The blue thrusters remain constant against the dark nebula backdrop while smaller asteroids drift past on all sides, creating a sense of forward momentum through the debris field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the void of deep space as a spaceship penetrates an increasingly dense field of rocky debris. It begins with the vessel maintaining a steady course against a dark nebula backdrop, with only small, scattered asteroids drifting past on all sides. As the ship pushes forward, the distant center of the frame gradually fills with a concentrated cluster of asteroids that shift from the background into the immediate foreground. The scene then intensifies as the blue glow of the thrusters cuts through the deepening congestion of stone, creating a mounting sense of momentum through the asteroid field.
